lines.text: Back on My Jobs, you simply watch the staged gate march to completion.
Award, agreements, inspection, permits, payment, and finally execution, every stage visible.
You never have to phone around or wonder where things stand, the dashboard always tells you.
When the work is signed off, Nguzo settles the suppliers and the job closes, cleanly.
And if something ever goes wrong on the ground, our field and admin teams act, you're never left chasing a supplier alone.
That's the whole point, you post once, and a verified, escrow-protected job runs itself.
